title: Baker's Recipe List — Recipe
description: The single hard-coded contract every recipe in src/data/recipes.json must satisfy. recipes.json is a JSON array of objects shaped exactly like this. When adding or editing a recipe, conform to THIS file — do not infer the shape from an existing recipe. Enforced at build time by scripts/validate-recipes.mjs (runs as the npm `prebuild` hook, so a violation fails `npm run build` and CI).

name.description: The canonical unique key used everywhere in the app (state keys, ?recipe= deep links, lookups). MUST be globally unique across all recipes.

section.description: Display group. MUST be one of the keys defined in src/data/sections.js (the validator drift-guards this enum against that file). The `FOR REVIEW ...` keys are a staging area surfaced under the app's For-Review tab; they are known tech debt pending a status-field refactor — do not add new recipes there unless intentionally staging for review.

category.description: Coarse grouping label. MUST be one of the values below.

source.description: Attribution. Use "Original" for the author's own recipes; otherwise name the source(s).

ingredients.description: Ordered list. type:item is an actual ingredient line. type:section and type:header are sub-grouping labels within the ingredient list (e.g. 'For the sauce:'). A non-blank recipe must contain at least one type:item entry.

instructions.description: Ordered method steps. Two valid conventions coexist: (A) classic — {step: short title, detail: full instruction text}; (B) grouped (used by multi-version marinades) — {type, step: the full content, detail: ""} where type:section/header is a sub-heading like "Version 1" and type:item is a step. Rule: `step` is always non-empty; `detail` is required but may be empty; `type`, when present, is item|section|header. A non-blank recipe must have at least one instruction.

is_blank.description: true = placeholder rendered as a 'coming soon' row (ingredients/instructions may be empty). false = a real recipe, which MUST have at least one type:item ingredient and at least one instruction.
